notes: Official Staten Island Zoo birthday-parties and contact pages reviewed May 16, 2026. Hero image is an official Wix-hosted birthday-party photograph from statenislandzoo.org, downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.
missingOrUncertain: pricePerClass uses $650, the published non-member package price; member price is $600 and discounts apply at checkout when logged into a member account.
Party capacity maximum is 40 people per the official birthday page; families must supply their own cake or cupcakes.

document.name: Staten Island Zoo Birthday Parties
document.shortDescription: Weekend zoo birthday parties: animal encounter, craft, carousel ride, pizza, and juice in the Zoo Café—$650 non-member / $600 member for up to 40 guests.
document.longDescription:
The Staten Island Zoo advertises children’s birthday parties as a two-hour experience on Saturdays and Sundays at 10:30 a.m. or 1:30 p.m. in the Zoo Café, led by a zoo instructor. The official birthday-parties page describes meeting animals up close, a carousel ride, pizza and juice, an animal mask craft, animal-themed paper goods, and 32 invitations. Maximum party capacity is 40 people. Families must supply their own cake or cupcakes.

Published pricing on the same page: $600 for zoo members and $650 for non-members, with member discounts applied at checkout when logged into a member account on the zoo’s registration portal.

Location from the official contact page: 614 Broadway, Staten Island, NY 10310. Party registration and availability are handled through the zoo’s online system; education inquiries are commonly directed to 718-442-3100 ext. 33 per the zoo’s facility-registration pages.

Sources: https://www.statenislandzoo.org/birthday-parties https://www.statenislandzoo.org/contact https://statenislandzoo.doubleknot.com/facilitysearch/3770
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists 10:30 a.m. and 1:30 p.m. Saturday and Sunday parties in the Zoo Café—register online for availability.
